• Responsive UI with mobile controls, custom bevel borders, and a start/menu system.
  • Procedurally generated world, mining mechanics (including AOE), inventory, and a shop for upgrades.
  • Multiplayer support via MQTT, host‑election, sync, chat, and admin panel.
    Game.init()
    Shop.buy('drill')

This HTML/JS app creates a voxel‑style mining game with day/night cycles, heat management, and customizable textures. It includes a multiplayer layer with host‑migration, chat, and admin controls, while offering a rich UI for inventory, upgrades, and settings. All visuals use a CSS‑driven bevel style and adaptive layouts for desktop and mobile devices.
